snippet.title: The Battles : Kasun /Lakindu/Pasindu V Janitha Nipun | Hey Ganaraya | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

Song Lyrics:
මං කියන දේ ආදරෙන් අහන්නකෝ
වංචා හිතේ වැරදි අත් හරින්නකෝ
දැන් මා ඔබේ ලඟ නොවේ හිතන්නකෝ
මින් මතු ලොවේ හොඳට කල් ගෙවන්නකෝ

ප්‍රශ්නයක් අහන්නද - ලස්සනයිද ජීවිතේ
උත්තරෙත් කියන්නද - වැරදුනානෙ ජීවිතේ..//

ඔබ කලේ සෙල්ලමක් - මං පරාද චරිතයක්
ජීවිතේ හිරගෙයක් - දුකම වින්ඳා කාලයක්
නෑ පොහොසත් කම දුප්පත් - පිලිගන්නවා මගේ
තව දුරටත් හිත සවිමත් - වට්ටන්න බෑ හොඳේ

ප්‍රශ්නයක් අහන්නද - ලස්සනයිද ජීවිතේ
උත්තරෙත් කියන්නද - වැරදුනානෙ ජීවිතේ..//

සිහිවුනා පොඩි දෙයක් - ඔබ කියාපු වචනයක්
ආදරෙයි මහ ගොඩක් - කිවුව නැද්ද මතකයක්
නෑ පොහොසත් කම දුප්පත් - පිලිගන්නවා මගේ
තව දුරටත් හිත සවිමත් - වට්ටන්න බෑ හොඳේ

ප්‍රශ්නයක් අහන්නද - ලස්සනයිද ජීවිතේ
උත්තරෙත් කියන්නද - වැරදුනානෙ ජීවිතේ..//

snippet.title: IF SWEET FOOD WERE PEOPLE! Relatable Situations With Candy And Other Food by Crafty Panda
snippet.description:
Hey there, foodie Pandas! Have you ever wondered what our food thinks and how it feels? Fizzy drinks damaging your teeth? Not a problem, we have Miss Chewing Gum to kick the bad guys out of your mouth! How does a french fry feel being dipped in ketchup? Or a steak being massaged? Let’s keep watching and find out! Don’t forget to stay tuned for more awkward moments & relatable situations by Crafty Panda!

If you enjoyed this video, you might also like “RICH VS POOR WAYS TO SNEAK FOOD ANYWHERE! Clever & Funny Ways to Sneak Snacks by Crafty Panda”: https://youtu.be/T3NZLBivdcM

Love the music used in this video? You can find our music on EpidemicSound: https://bit.ly/2JcUlBa

snippet.title: ‘A coronavirus tsunami we had never seen before’ - BBC News
snippet.description:
India's Covid caseload has risen sharply in the past few weeks.

The country's been reporting more than 150,000 cases a day. In January and February daily cases fell below 20,000.

So, how did India get from relative calm to its new crisis?

Workplaces, markets and malls have reopened, and transport is operating at full capacity. Big weddings, festivals and election rallies are also being held.

The result: a situation that one doctor described as a "Covid tsunami".

The BBC's Vikas Pandey and Anshul Verma report.

Additional inputs by BBC Marathi, graphics by Nikita Deshpande.

Additional footage from Reuters and Getty.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: සඳ කියන්නේ පිස්සුවක් | Piyath Rajapakse & Sandani Fernando | Music Pickle
snippet.description:
Music Pickle එකට ආදරේ කරන ඔයාල බලාගෙන ඇති මේ සතියේ කවුද අපි program එකට එකතු කරගත්තේ කියලා. මේ සතියේ අපි එකතු කරගත්තේ ගොඩාක් ආදරෙන් ඉන්න තරු දෙකක්. ඒ තමයි Sirasa Super Star තරගය ජයග්‍රහණය කරමින් ක්ෂේත්‍රයට පැමිණි පියත් රාජපක්ෂ සහ මේ දිනවල ටෙලිනාට්‍ය කීපයකින්ම ඔබ හමුවට එන දක්ෂ රංගන ශිල්පිණියක් වන සදනි ෆනෑන්ඩු.
මේ දෙදෙනා පෞද්ගලික ජීවිතේදීත් හරිම Loving Couple එකක් නිසා දෙන්නා එක්ක ලස්සන වගේම ආදරණීය program එකක් කරන්න Music Pickle අපිට පුලුවන් වුණා. ඉතින් එකතු වෙන්න වෙනදා වගේම Music Pickle සමගින්.

Production Manager : Samith Roshan
Producer : Dilini Madusanka Perera
Assistant Producer : Charitha Gangewaththa
Director of Photography : Dammika Dissanayake
Camera Operators : Amayuru Withanage | Shiran Wimukthi | Akila Heshan
Editor : Dasun Prabhashwara

snippet.title: Covid spreading faster in India than anywhere else - BBC News
snippet.description:
India reported a record daily increase of over 150,000 coronavirus cases - and more than 800 new deaths - on Sunday.
Since the pandemic began, the country has confirmed more than 12 million cases and over 167,000 deaths.
It has the third-highest number of Covid-19 infections in the world after the United States and Brazil.



Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: B&B එක්ක අවුරුදු - Episode 3 | Kokila Pawan & Nimali Fernando
snippet.description:
මේ දවස්වල ටෙලිවිෂන් බලන හැමෝම වගේ හුඟක් ආදරේ කරන චරිතයක් තමයි මාලන්. මාලන් කියනවටත් වඩා "මනමාලං" කියල තමයි එයාව හුඟ දෙනෙක් අඳුනන්නෙ. ඉතිං මේ සැරේ අපේ අවුරුදු කෑම Challenge එකට එකතු වුනේ පුංචි තිරයේ මනමාලන් වූ 'කෝකිල පවන්' සහ ඔහුගේ බිරිඳ 'නිමාලි ප්‍රනාන්දු' දෙන්නා. මේ දෙන්නට අපි දුන්න Challenge එක තමයි අග්ගලා හදන්න. කොහොමින් හරි අග්ගලා හැදිල්ලට අමතරව විවාහ ජීවිතයට වැදගත් පාඩමකුත් ඉගෙන ගන්න කෝකිලට පුළුවන් වුනා.


Subscribe to : https://goo.gl/Ym9F5f 
Like us on Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/boldandbeautifullk/
Follow us on Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/boldandbeautiful_lk/

snippet.description:

#comedianvivek #Vivek #Actorvivek

Tamil actor Vivek passed away in a Chennai hospital early on Saturday following a cardiac arrest. He was 59. Vivek was admitted to the intensive care unit of the hospital on Friday morning after he suffered a heart attack. A medical bulletin said he underwent “emergency coronary angiogram followed by angioplasty” on Friday.

snippet.title: Watch: Doctor Breaks Down, Says "Never Seen Anything Like This"
snippet.description:
Coronavirus News in Mumbai: "We are helpless... never seen such a situation before... people are panicking..." - the desperate words of an overworked and traumatised Mumbai doctor driven to tears as an avalanche of Covid-positive patients threatens to overrun the medical infrastructure in one of the world's biggest cities. An appeal by Dr Trupti Gilada, an infectious diseases specialist, was widely shared on Tuesday - as the scale of the crisis - the lack of hospital beds, ever-increasing daily new cases, shortage of vaccines and crucial drugs like Remdesivir, and the oxygen crisis - becomes clear.

Latest romantic music video "#Poronduwak" sung by singer -  #ManejSanjaya .
The Video is Directed By Thiwanka Mihiran, Lyrics by ' Prasanna Kumara Dammalage ' & Music by ' Hashan Thilina '.

Dial Now...

▶Song Name : Poronduwak
▶Artist : #ManejSanjaya
▶Lyrics : Prasanna Kumara Dammalage
▶Music : Hashan Thilina
▶Video Director : Thiwanka Mihiran
▶Production: #EvokeMusic

මා ඉන්නම් ඈතකින් නොගැටී ඔය ඇස් දෙකේ 
හැමදාමත් ආදරේ සඟවා හිතේ 
හිමිවීමක් නෑ ඉතින් ලං වූවට ඒ වගේ 
කවදාවත් ඉටු නොවේ පැතුමන් අපේ
අහඹුවක් නොවේ වුනත් මුණගැහීම මේ 
අරන් යන්න බෑ දුරක් ඇසුර තව අපේ 

පොරොන්දුවක් මේක මගේ වෙනස් නොවන කිසිදාක 
දුරස් වුනත් ඔබට හිතේ තියේවි ඉඩ හැමදාක

මුළු රෑ පුරා නින්දෙන් මා මුදා
ඒ මතකයන් හැමදා සිහිවෙලා 
හිත පෑරුවත් කොතරම් විඳ දරා 
ඉන්නම් ඉතින් නෑවිත් යලි සදා

හුරුකම් නිසා සසරේ පෙර එදා 
බැදුනත් ඉතින් නොදැනී නොසිතලා 
හැර යන්නේ නෑ කීවත් දිවුරලා 
අපි මේ භවේ අපගෙන් ගිලිහිලා

snippet.title: ✔ අපේ අම්මාගේ වෙනස්ම ක්‍රමයට සුවඳ හමන බිත්තර කහබත Rice can be cooked like this with eggs Apé Amma
snippet.description:
Rice can be cooked like this with eggs.   Like "Apé Amma" fan page. https://www.facebook.com/ApeAmmaFans/
Egg yellow rice Recipe. 

500g samba rice
4 eggs
1/2 tsp turmeric powder
1 tbsp chili powder
1 1/2 tsp black pepper
3 tamarind seeds
2 small cinnamon sticks
7-8 cloves
8 cardamom

3 garlic cloves
a piece of ginger
1 B onion
2 green chilies
curry leaves & rampa
1 lemon grass
1 1/2 tsp salt
coconut oil


කීරි සම්බා ග්‍රෑම් 500යි
බිත්තර 4යි
කහ කුඩු තේ හැඳි 1/2
මිරිස් කුඩු මේස හැඳි 1 
ගම්මිරිස් තේ හැඳි 1 1/2
සියඹලා ඇට 3ක්
කුරුඳු පොතු කැලි 2ක්
කරබුනැටි 7 - 8

කරදමුංගු 8
සුදුළුෑණු බික් 3යි
ඉඟ=රු කෑල්ලක්
බී ළුෑණු ගෙඩි 1යි
අමු මිරිස් කරල් 2යි
කරපිංචා / රම්පේ
සේර ගහක්
ලුණු කුඩු තේ හැඳි 1 1/2
පොල් තෙල් 
自從知道米飯可以這樣煮，我家大米不夠吃了，挑食的孩子也搶著吃

snippet.title: ඉස්කෝලෙට අවුරුදු | Music Pickle Awrudu Special
snippet.description:
මේ සතියේ Music Pickle වැඩසටහන ගොඩාක් වෙනස්. අලුත් අවුරුද්දත් අරගෙනම අපි ආවේ ඔයාලා ගොඩාක් ආදරේ කරන පිරිසක් එක්ක. මේ දවස් වල TV දෙරණ ඔස්සේ විකාශනය වන " ඉස්කෝලේ " ටෙලිනාට්‍යයට රංගනයෙන් දායක වන දමිත්‍රි ,ධනුශ්ක, හිරුෂි, නිසල්,තිනුලි, දිනුජ්, විනුක් සහ එහි තේමා ගීතය ගායනා කරන නුවන්දිකා සේනාරත්න යන අය තමා Music Pickle එක්ක අවුරුදු සමරන්න එකතු වුණේ. ඔවුන් program එක ලස්සන කරන්න ලස්සනට සින්දු කිව්වා,ලස්සන නැටුම් ඉදිරිපත් කළා. ඒ විතරක් නෙවෙයි අලුත් අවුරුදු ක්‍රීඩා කිහිපයකටම සහභාගී වුණේ ගොඩාක් උනන්දුවෙන්. ඉතින් Music pickle සමගින් එකතුවෙන්න ආරාධනා කරමින් music pickle අපි ප්‍රාර්ථනා කරනවා ඔබට ලැබුවා වූ නව වසර නිරෝගිමත් සුභම සුභ අලුත් අවුරුද්දක් වේවා කියලා.


Production Manager : Samith Roshan
Producer : Dilini Madusanka Perera
Assistant Producer : Charitha Gangewaththa
Director of Photography : Dammika Dissanayake
Camera Operators : Amayuru Withanage | Shiran Wimukthi | Akila Heshan
Editor : Dasun Prabhashwara
Post Production Supervision : Vishwa Abhishek 
Special Thanks : Nisanka Weheraduwa



Subscribe us : https://bit.ly/3hemfOs
Like us on Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/MusicPickle/

snippet.title: The Battles : Julius Mitchell V Subhath Sanjula | Mal Madahasa (මල් මදහාස)  | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

#TheVoiceSL #SirasaTV #TheVoiceSriLanka #TheVoiceSL #TheVoiceLK #VoiceSriLanka #VoiceLK #lka

It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial

snippet.title: 314,000 daily cases: India struggles with the world's worst coronavirus outbreak | COVID-19 Special
snippet.description:
India population counts more than 1.3 billion people. Confirmed cases of COVID-19 are increasing very rapidly with currently more than 314,000 new infections in a single day. The positive rate of tests also increased strongly (from 2% to almost 10%). So far, over 15.3 million people got infected with SARS-CoV-2 in India. 
It's the worst coronavirus outbreak for any country. India's hospitals are close to collapse. They're running out of medication and oxygen. Two thousand people died on Wednesday alone. India had come off relatively lightly during the pandemic. But the number of infections has rocketed in recent weeks. Why is the big question. Some doctors blame more infectious variants. Others point to loose restrictions and people letting down their guard, after hearing about the vaccine or following India's fairly unscathed brush with the first wave.

Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: Apple Event — April 20
snippet.description:
Watch the special Apple Event and learn about the new iMac, iPad Pro, and more.

To watch the event interpreted in American Sign Language (ASL), please click here https://youtu.be/TWIHE9yEdOw 

00:00 Introduction 

04:51 iPhone 12 
06:06 AirTag 
10:36 Apple TV 
18:21 iMac
36:34 iPad Pro

'The Darkness You Fear' - The Chemical Brothers 
'The Candy Man' - Aubrey Woods http://apple.co/TheCandyMan
'Every Color' - Louis The Child, Foster the People http://apple.co/EveryColor 
'Aquarium (Improvisation after Le Carnaval des animaux by Camille Saint-Saëns)’ - Thomas Enhco, Vassilena Serafimova & Camille Saint-Saëns http://apple.co/Aquarium
‘HIGH' - BAYNK http://apple.co/High
'Carrera' - Brokenstra & YADAM http://apple.co/Carrera

'Note To Self (feat. Empress Of)' - Jim-E Stack http://apple.co/NoteToSelf
‘Comin' in Hot' - Atomic Drum Assembly http://apple.co/ComininHot
'Celeryjuice' - Party Favor http://apple.co/Celeryjuice
‘Move (feat. Sandwich Club)' - Jamra http://apple.co/Move
'Dream State' - Son Lux http://apple.co/DreamState


#AppleEvent #SpringLoaded #iPadPro #iPhone #iMac #M1 #AirTag #AppleTV

Watch Polimer News, Tamil Nadu’s No. 1 news channel, live! Catch breaking news and live reports as they emerge around the world. Stay updated on the latest stories from the worlds of politics, entertainment, sports, business, social media and so much more. Polimer News is your trusted source for crisp and unbiased news. Tamil News | Headlines News | Speed News | World News

Website: https://www.polimernews.com

Like us on: https://www.facebook.com/polimernews

Follow us on: https://twitter.com/polimernews


About Polimer News:

Polimer News brings unbiased News and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.

Polimer News has evolved as a 24 hours Tamil News satellite TV channel. Polimer is the second largest MSO in TN catering to millions of TV viewing homes across 10 districts of TN. Founded by Mr. P.V. Kalyana Sundaram, the company currently runs 8 basic cable TV channels in various parts of TN and Polimer TV, a fully integrated Tamil GEC reaching out to millions of Tamil viewers across the world. The channel has state of the art production facility in Chennai. Besides a library of more than 350 movies on an exclusive basis , the channel also beams 8 hours of original content every day. The channel has extended its vision to various genres including Reality. In short, Polimer is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Polimer’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Polimer a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

snippet.title: මාගල්කන්දේ සුදද්ත ගෝඨාගේ කුපාඩි වැඩ රැසක් හෙලිකරයි
snippet.description:
https://lrnews.ch/
https://www.facebook.com/lrnews.ch/
Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

snippet.title: Asku Maaro Video | Kavin, Teju Ashwini | Dharan Kumar | K. Sivaangi | Dongli Jumbo | Sandy
snippet.description:
Stream now - https://SMI.lnk.to/AskuMaaro

The rollicking music video of #AskuMAaro composed by #DharanKumar starring #Kavin , #TejuAshwini& #Sivaangi is here! This unapologetically fun and groovy song has lyrics by #KuKarthik and is all ready to make its way to your favourite Tamil Playlist and you simply cannot miss this one! 

Song - Asku Maaro
Composed by Dharan Kumar
Featuring - Kavin, Teju Ashwini
Sung by Dharan Kumar & K. Sivaangi
Lyrics - Ku. Karthik
Directed by Dongli Jumbo
DOP - Madhesh Manickam
Direction team - Raaja Senthil | Joshi | Nethan
Dop Team - Ilayaraja , Yuvaraj Dakshan ,Sandy Sanyog.


The Route - Jagadish Palanisamy
Creative Director Karthik Srinivas (NOISE AND GRAINS)
Business Director Mahaveer Ashok (NOISE AND GRAINS)

Direction team - Raaja Senthil | Joshi | Nethan
Asst Choreographer

snippet.title: Nayanthara Latest Superhit Tamil Movie | Jai Simha | Balakrishna | Natasha Doshi | KS Ravi Kumar
snippet.description:
Watch Jai Simha Full Movie.

Starring: Nandamuri Balakrishna​, #Nayanthara​, Hari Priya​, Natasha Doshi​ and others.
Director: KS Ravi Kumar
Producer: I & M Studios
Music: Chirantan Bhatt​

Synopsis:
Narasimha(Balakrishna) along with his just-born son moves to Kumbakonam and starts working as a driver. There, he comes across a corrupt cop and keeps fighting with him time and again. During one of the key problems involving the cop, Narasimha suddenly finds out that the cop’s wife is none other than his ex-girlfriend Gauri(Nayanthara). Who is this Narasimha? Why did he come to Kumbakonam? What is his backstory with Gauri?

snippet.title: 'Mrs World' grabs crown from head of ‘Mrs Sri Lanka’ in on-stage fracas
snippet.description:
Police have arrested the reigning “Mrs World” on charges of assault over an on-stage fracas in which she pulled the crown off the head of the new “Mrs Sri Lanka”. 

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube ► http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

Caroline Jurie yanked the crown off Pushpika de Silva minutes after she was declared “Mrs Sri Lanka 2020” during a gala in Colombo on April 4. Jurie declared that Pushpika de Silva was ineligible as the winner because she was divorced, and forcibly removed her crown. De Silva needed hospital treatment after the incident, seen by stunned spectators in a packed venue as well as a live social media audience. 

To qualify for the title, contestants must be married. De Silva is estranged from her husband, but they are still legally married. The local franchise holder for the pageant, Chandimal Jayasinghe, said they were “deeply disturbed and sincerely regret” the behaviour of Jurie and the told the media the crown would be returned to De Silva 

‘Mrs World’ arrested for grabbing crown from head of ‘Mrs Sri Lanka’ ► https://www.theguardian.com/world/2021/apr/08/mrs-world-arrested-for-grabbing-crown-from-head-of-mrs-sri-lanka

The Guardian publishes independent journalism, made possible by supporters. Contribute to The Guardian today ► https://bit.ly/3uhA7zg

snippet.title: Nayanthara Latest Blockbuster Tamil Movie | Engal Ayya | Namitha | Balakrishna | Sneha Ullal
snippet.description:
Watch Engal Ayya (Simha) Full Movie.

Starring: #Nayanthara​, Balakrishna​, Namitha, Sneha Ullal, Venu Madhav, ​ and others.
Director : Boyapati Srinu
Music Director : Chakri
Producer: I & M Studios

Synopsis:
Balakrishna Stars As Srimann Narayana, A College Professor Who’s Hot-Blooded By Nature. He Doesn’t Tolerate Injustice And Would Go To Any Length To Save The Ones Who Are Close To His Heart. One Day, A New Girl Named Janaki (Sneha Ullal) Joins His College And Almost Immediately Janaki Falls In Love With Him. Even Srimann Narayana’s Grandmother Likes Janaki And Asks Him To Marry Janaki. However, Janaki Has A Violent Past Which Is Closely Linked To Srimann’s Own Past. Soon, His Grandmother Narrates All About His Past, His Father And Royal Family. What Did She Tell Him? Who Was Srimann’s Father? How Is Janaki Related To Narayana?

#BhavaniHDMovies

snippet.title: India sets global record for new cases amid oxygen shortage - BBC News
snippet.description:
India is in the grip of a vicious second wave and an acute oxygen shortage is raising more fears about its overwhelmed health care system.

In the past 24 hours alone, more than 2,000 people have died and nearly 300,000 new cases have been reported in the country.

It brings the country's current total confirmed cases close to 16 million, second only to the US's 31.9 million.

The situation has led Delhi's highest court to publicly criticised the central government for its handling of the oxygen crisis in the city.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#India #Coronavirus #BBCNews

snippet.title: Jai Sulthan Video (Tamil) - Sulthan | Karthi, Rashmika | Vivek-Mervin | Anirudh | Bakkiyaraj Kannan
snippet.description:
Dream Warrior Pictures Proudly Presents the Video Song of “Jai Sulthan” From Karthi's #Sulthan, Directed By Bakkiyaraj Kannan. #Karthi | #RashmikaMandanna | #BakkiyarajKannan | #VivekMervin | #Anirudh  | #SRPrabhu | #DreamWarriorPictures

Song: Jai Sulthan
Music: VIVEK - MERVIN
Lyrics: Viveka
Singers: Anirudh Ravichander, Junior Nithya & Gana Guna

iTunes:https://music.apple.com/in/album/jai-sulthan-from-sulthan-single/1552701719?at=1l3v9Tx&uo=4&app=itunes

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/3t8eTRRkTRs9mxxYWZK9Xz

Amazon Music: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08W5C3LWC

Resso : https://m.resso.app/ZSJ19eWPk/

YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=VOw1RYZFU_Q&feature=share

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/jai-sulthan

Hungama: https://www.hungama.com/album/jai-sulthan-from-sulthan/62168286/

Jio Saavn: https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/jai-sulthan-from-sulthan/cqF5r2p8hIA_

Wynk Music: https://wynk.in/u/j7ooonu7M

*பாடல் வரிகள்*

சண்டையில கீயாத 
சட்டையில்லா குமாரே

ஹேய் …ஹேய் 
ஹேய் …ஹேய் 

மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா 
சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

ஹேய் …ஹேய் 
ஹேய் …ஹேய் 

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே .....
என் தெளலத்மாரே.... 
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் 
என்  அண்ணன்மாரே ....

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே....
என் தெளலத்மாரே ....
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் 
என் அண்ணன்மாரே .....

ஏய் மத்தநாளு கிதான்றதே,சந்தேக கேசே ….
இங்க மன்ஷனுங்க ,எல்லாருமே  காமடி பீசே ...
நீ வாயகட்டி  வயத்தகட்டி ,சேக்காத காசே ...
சோறு துண்ணும்போது விக்கிச்சீனா 
எல்லாம் குளோசே ...

வா...சுல்தான் ,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா....

உனக்குன்னுதான் ,தரவா.. தரவா 
உசுர தரவா..
கலக்குறியே சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா ...

உனக்குன்னுதான்,தரவா …தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே,என் தெளலத்மாரே ...
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் ,என் அண்ணன்மாரே...


ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் குந்தல்,
நிக்கல் குந்தல்
நிக்கலு  குந்தல்
நிக்கலு குந்தலு 

சபா டேய் ....
வயசாகுது  டா...
அய்யயோ …
அடங்கமாட்டீங்களா டா …

டேய்..
ஹே ஊரில் ரொம்ப பெரு 
மூஞ்ச உத்து பாரு ,
பூரான் உட்டு இருப்போம் 


மொரட்டு பீஸு …எல்லாம் ….
உருட்டு கட்டையால…
பொரட்டி …போட்டி …எடுப்போம் 
ஊய் ..சொக்கா மாட்டிகினு 
சோலி பாக்க …போனா 
தொக்க ஆல …புடிப்போம் 
பீடா போட்டமேறி …வாய கோயப்பிட்டு 
டாடா காட்டி …வருவோம் 

சம்பவம் செய்யும் வேலைய எல்லாம் 
அஞ்சாறு வாரம் ஒத்தி போடு ….
வம்புக்கு யாரும் வந்தாலும் கூட …
வள்ளலார் போல வணக்கம் போடு 

வா...சுல்தான் ,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா.... 
உனக்குன்னுதான்,தரவா தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

வா...சுல்தான்,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா.... 

உனக்குன்னுதான், தரவா  தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...
தூக்கி சொல்லு….

வா சுல்தான் , வா சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா ...

உனக்குன்னுதான் தரவா  தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

சண்டையில கீயாத ,சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டு போவாட்டா, சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

சண்டையில கீயாத, சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா ,சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

சண்டையில கீயாத ,சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா, சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே …

snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj #AlluArjun​ #PushpaTeaser #PreludeOfPushparaj #Rashmika​ #Faasil #Sukumar​ #DSP #MythriMovieMakers​ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

Click here to watch:

Prelude of Pushparaj: https://youtu.be/gbcpEbr6ECA

Uppena Deleted scene: https://youtu.be/TZGY-HJNt5g​​

#AA20​​ Movie Launch : https://youtu.be/cs_drz6Ps5I​​

snippet.title: Wow Life Presents Achuma's Kitchen Tour ft. Archana & Zaara #WowLife
snippet.description:
The kitchen is the heart of the home! 

When we built and designed this home, our first thought was the kitchen!
Here’s presenting Achuma’s Kitchen and the organising of this whole space!

In a small bite, this kitchen is the happiness-spreading epicentre of the home!

Come along and tour Achuma’s kitchen with Zaara and Archana :-)

For more Entertaining videos, Subscribe to WOW LIFE 👉 https://bit.ly/WowLife_Official
